title: delphinastrum exaltatum
intro: Delphinastrum exaltatum, also known as mountain delphinium, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. The medicinal properties of Delphinastrum exaltatum are attributed to its root, which contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Delphinastrum exaltatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Delphinastrum exaltatum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
